input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.4.2
            TITLE: the accumulator isolation relays must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.4.2: The Accumulator Isolation Relays must:
EV.5.4.2 The Accumulator Isolation Relays must: 
a. Be a Normally Open type 
b. Open both poles of the Accumulator

final_answer: rule EV.5.4.2: The Accumulator Isolation Relays must: EV.5.4.2 The Accumulator Isolation Relays must: a. Be a Normally Open type b. Open both poles of the Accumulator
